de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

Class Bigint

  • java.lang.Object

      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.Bigint
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ProgramModelElement, Type, AccessFlags, ModelElement, NamedModelElement

    public final class Bigint
extends PrimitiveType
    RecodeR extension for JML's \bigint type.
